speaker: speaker1
text: I can ’ t stand being with you anymore . I'm sick of your drinking .

speaker: speaker2
text: I swear never to drink again . Just give me another chance , please !

speaker: speaker1
text: How many chances have I given you ? I don ’ t trust you any more .

speaker: speaker2
text: You know how hard I've tried to give up drinking ? I ’ d be lost without you . I won ’ t let you go anyway .
